title: Dead indirection: _test_db_path attribute is never set
evidence: app.py:13 `getattr(app, '_test_db_path', DATABASE)` — `_test_db_path` is set nowhere in app.py or test_app.py, so the getattr always falls back to the module-global DATABASE (which the test fixture reassigns directly). Confusing, unused hook.
suggestion: Drop the getattr and read DATABASE directly, or actually set app._test_db_path in the test fixture instead of reassigning the module global.

title: ?author= filter is exact-match only
evidence: app.py:94 `SELECT * FROM books WHERE author = ?` uses equality, so partial/case-insensitive author matches are not supported. Spec (R3) only requires an author filter, which this satisfies.
suggestion: Optional: use LIKE / COLLATE NOCASE if fuzzy author matching is desired. Not required by the task.
